title: Marvell Technology Q2 Preview: Can the Earnings Streak Continue?
text: Marvell Technology was scheduled to unveil Q2 earnings on Thursday, August 25, after market close. The Zacks Consensus EPS Estimate was $0.56, reflecting a 64% year-over-year increase in quarterly earnings. Marvell was forecasted to have generated $1.5 billion in quarterly revenue, reflecting year-over-year growth of 41%. Marvell had been on an inspiring earnings streak, exceeding the Zacks Consensus EPS Estimate in five consecutive quarters. The preview indicated that analysts expected strong performance from Marvell Technology heading into the Q2 2022 earnings report, with significant growth expected in both earnings and revenue metrics.
